title: Chat
outOfWorkingHours: Please visit us during working hours. Agents are not available
subject: Subject
thanksMessage: It was our pleasure assisting you with your query.

ewt: and the approximate wait time is
inactivityMessage: Do you have any queries? Your chat session will be ended automatically.

error.serverDown: We are experiencing some technical problem with our server. Your chat has been disabled.
error.getBackToYou: We will get back to you as soon as issue is resolved.

callback.title: Callback

callback.error: We are unable to process your request
callback.conflict: Callback request is already saved. We will contact you shortly.

confirmation_message: Are you sure to end the conversation?
